name: Baffin Bay Networks
notes:
Baffin Bay Networks, a Mastercard company, is a provider of Threat Protection - DDoS Protection, Threat Intelligence, Web Application Firewall, Bot Protection and Application Performance.

For more information about our peering policy please visit https://baffinbaynetworks.com/legal/peering-policy

If you are under attack please contact us on support@baffinbaynetworks.com or if you have sales inquiries please contact us on sales@baffinbaynetworks.com.
